pokemon:haunter.name: Haunter
pokemon:haunter.summary: Haunter is a dangerous Pokémon. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This Pokémon will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Haunter is a dangerous Pokémon. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This Pokémon will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.
It hides in the dark, planning to take the life of the next living thing that wanders close by.
It can slip through any obstacle. It lurks inside walls to keep an eye on its foes.
If a HAUNTER beckons you while it is floating in darkness, don’t approach it. This POKéMON will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, HAUNTER is there.
In total darkness, where nothing is visible, HAUNTER lurks, silently stalking its next victim.
In total darkness, where nothing is visible, HAUNTER lurks, silently stalking its next victim.
Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.
This frightful, malevolent spirit can glide through walls, appearing wherever it likes. According to rumor, victims of a Haunter's lick will wither to death day by day.
By licking, it saps the victim’s life. It causes shaking that won’t stop until the victim’s demise.
By licking, it saps the victim’s life. It causes shaking that won’t stop until the victim’s demise.
It fears the light and revels in the dark. It may be on the verge of extinction in cities that stay brightly lit at night.
Haunter is a dangerous Pokémon. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This Pokémon will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
It licks with its gaseous tongue to steal the victim’s life force. It lurks in darkness for prey.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.
HAUNTER is a dangerous POKéMON. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This POKéMON will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
HAUNTER is a dangerous POKéMON. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This POKéMON will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.
If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, Haunter is there.
Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death even­ tually comes.
Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death eventually comes.
It strikes at humans from total darkness. Those licked by its cold tongue grow weaker with each passing day until they die.
Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death eventually comes.
It’s dangerous to go outside alone on nights when you’re feeling sad. Haunter will catch you, and you won’t be able to go back home.
On moonless nights, Haunter searches for someone to curse, so it’s best not to go out walking around.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, Haunter is there.
It licks with its gaseous tongue to steal the victim’s life force. It lurks in darkness for prey.
By licking, it saps the victim's life. It causes shaking that won't stop until the victim's demise.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Haunter is a dangerous Pokémon. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This Pokémon will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.

pokemon:gastly.name: Gastly
pokemon:gastly.summary: Gastly is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this Pokémon cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Gastly is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this Pokémon cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.
It wraps its op­ ponent in its gas- like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.
This Pokémon’s body is 95% made up of gases, which are blown away by strong gusts of wind.
When exposed to a strong wind, a GASTLY’s gaseous body quickly dwindles away. They cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.
A being that exists as a thin gas. It can topple an Indian elephant by enveloping the prey in two seconds.
With its gas-like body, it can sneak into any place it desires. However, it can be blown away by wind.
With its gas-like body, it can sneak into any place it desires. However, it can be blown away by wind.
Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.
Gaseous and completely impalpable. Also highly dangerous— inhaling part of its poisonous body will cause one to faint instantly.
Said to appear in decrepit, deserted buildings. It has no real shape, as it appears to be made of a gas.
Said to appear in decrepit, deserted buildings. It has no real shape, as it appears to be made of a gas.
Although Gastly is barely visible, when it’s near, a faint sweet smell lingers.

Gastly is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this Pokémon cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.
A Pokémon born from poison gases. It defeats even the largest foes by enveloping them in gas.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

GASTLY is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this POKéMON cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.

GASTLY is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this POKéMON cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.
With its gas-like body, it can sneak into any place it desires. However, it can be blown away by wind.
Its thin body is made of gas. It can envelop an opponent of any size and cause suffocation.
Its body is made of gas. Despite lacking substance, it can envelop an opponent of any size and cause suffocation.
Should a strange light be seen flickering in an abandoned building, Gastly is lurking there.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Poisonous gas comprises 95% of its body. It’s said that the remaining 5% is made up of the souls of those who died from the gas.
It’s said that gas emanating from a graveyard was possessed by the grievances of the deceased and thus became a Pokémon.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Its body is made of gas. Despite lacking substance, it can envelop an opponent of any size and cause suffocation.
Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.
Said to appear in decrepit, deserted buildings. It has no real shape as it appears to be made of a gas.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Gastly is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this Pokémon cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.

pokemon:gengar.name: Gengar
pokemon:gengar.summary: Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a Gengar running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a Gengar running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
The leer that floats in darkness belongs to a Gengar delighting in casting curses on people.
The leer that floats in darkness belongs to a Gengar delighting in casting curses on people.
Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
Hiding in people's shadows at night, it absorbs their heat. The chill it causes makes the victims shake.
It hides in shadows. It is said that if GENGAR is hiding, it cools the area by nearly 10 degrees F.
Deep in the night, your shadow cast by a streetlight may suddenly overtake you. It is actually a GENGAR running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.
It steals heat from its surround­ ings. If you feel a sudden chill, it is certain that a GENGAR appeared.
It steals heat from its surroundings. If you feel a sudden chill, it is certain that a GENGAR appeared.
On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be GENGAR’s doing.
Possesses potential victims' shadows in an effort to steal away the victims' lives. If your shadow begins to laugh, you must take hold of a protective charm posthaste!
A Gengar is close by if you feel a sudden chill. It may be trying to lay a curse on you.
A Gengar is close by if you feel a sudden chill. It may be trying to lay a curse on you.
It apparently wishes for a traveling companion. Since it was once human itself, it tries to create one by taking the lives of other humans.
Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a Gengar running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
Lurking in the shadowy corners of rooms, it awaits chances to steal its prey’s life force.
The leer that floats in darkness belongs to a GENGAR delighting in casting curses on people.
Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a GENGAR running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a GENGAR running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.
To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey's shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.
To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey’s shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.
Should you feel yourself attacked by a sudden chill, it is evidence of an approaching Gengar. There is no escaping it. Give up.
On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be Gengar’s doing.
Even your home isn’t safe. Gengar will lurk in whatever dark corner of a room it can find and wait for its chance to catch its prey.
You can hear tales told all over the world about how Gengar will pay a visit to children who are naughty.
The leer that floats in darkness belongs to a Gengar delighting in casting curses on people.
The leer that floats in darkness belongs to a Gengar delighting in casting curses on people.
It hides in shadows. It is said that if Gengar is hiding, it cools the area by nearly 10 degrees Fahrenheit.
Hiding in people’s shadows at night, it absorbs their heat. The chill it causes makes the victims shake.
A GENGAR is close by if you feel a sudden chill. It may be trying to lay a curse on you.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a Gengar running past you, pretending to be your shadow.
